close_reason: Created solidity-hello-deps example with OpenZeppelin ERC20 token and forge-std
description:
Create examples/solidity-deps/ with:
- src/MyToken.sol - ERC20 token importing @openzeppelin/contracts
- solidity-deps.toml - generated by soldeps-gen
- foundry.toml with OpenZeppelin dependency
- rules.star demonstrating dependency usage

Verify:
- buck2 build //examples/solidity-deps:my_token
- Imports resolve correctly via remappings

Part of Solidity support (turnkey-ri2t).
title: Create Solidity example: with dependencies
